properties.name: Støjskærm, Dall
properties.source: Vejdirektoratet, Opdaterede støjberegninger for den 3. Limfjordsforbindelse, november 2023, Tabel 6
properties.note: Runs along the eastern side of E45 Nordjyske Motorvej near the Dall interchange. Path approximated from the report's Figure 3 city-scale map and offset from the existing Dall-area alignment; not pixel-registered to any coordinate grid.

properties.name: Støjskærm, Dall Villaby
properties.source: Vejdirektoratet, Opdaterede støjberegninger for den 3. Limfjordsforbindelse, november 2023, Tabel 6
properties.note: Runs on both sides of the 3. Limfjordsforbindelse east of Dallvej (6 m) and west of Dallvej (7 m) at Dall Villaby. Path approximated from the report's Figure 3 city-scale map and offset from the existing alignment; not pixel-registered to any coordinate grid.

properties.name: Støjskærm, Nibevej
properties.source: Vejdirektoratet, Opdaterede støjberegninger for den 3. Limfjordsforbindelse, november 2023, Tabel 6
properties.note: Runs on both sides of the 3. Limfjordsforbindelse south of Nibevej (5 m) and north of Nibevej (6 m), near Drastrup. Path approximated from the report's Figure 3 city-scale map and offset from the plan3 alignment; not pixel-registered to any coordinate grid.

properties.name: Støjskærm, Nørholmsvej
properties.source: Vejdirektoratet, Opdaterede støjberegninger for den 3. Limfjordsforbindelse, november 2023, Tabel 6
properties.note: Runs along the eastern side of the 3. Limfjordsforbindelse both north and south of Nørholmsvej, at interchange TSA 12 - Mølholm. Path approximated from the report's Figure 3 city-scale map and offset from the plan3/plan4 alignment; not pixel-registered to any coordinate grid.
